description: Manual AI-engine citation observations collected by Matthew (via Grok consumer UI) on/before 2026-07-10. Seed data for the GEO intelligence system: these are the URLs/domains AI engines actually cited for Utah roofing queries. Schema matches the planned citations table.
collected_by: manual (Grok web UI + Gemini side panel experiments)

observations.prompt: (context URLs collected during the same research session)

early_insights: Vertex Roofing (vertexroofingslc.com) cited in BOTH hail and wind queries — cross-query authority; study their page structure.

Sky Ridge cited twice within the wind query (two different URLs) — dedicated per-storm-type landing pages win (Rooval has combined coverage on the repair page; consider dedicated /hail-damage/ and /wind-damage/ pages).

insurance.utah.gov cited for wind query — engines pull the neutral .gov claims-info resource. Content-pillar opportunity: the definitive Utah storm-damage DOCUMENTATION guide (inspect+document lane, links to the .gov resource).
gaf.com contractor locator surfaces in research — confirms manufacturer-directory profiles are a priority off-site surface.
Every cited competitor URL for hail is a DEDICATED hail-damage page with city/state in slug — exact-match landing pages get cited, not homepages (except vertex).
